human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for cannabis-specific analytics boundaries, metric-definition rigor, seed-to-sale source control, testing and disclosure escalation behavior, functionality coverage, and validated spec-pack completeness.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue and cross-industry research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for analytics-reporting-and-disclosure plus cross-industry are represented and validated.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to cannabis analytics, metric-definition logic, reconciliation notes, benchmark discipline, caveat design, and disclosure-safe escalation rather than generic BI work.
Authority sources cover cannabis seed-to-sale systems, recordkeeping, manifests, daily reconciliation, testing and COA posture, benchmark metrics, and disclosure discipline.

Evaluation scenarios cover normal in-scope analysis, metric ambiguity, stale and conflicting data, unsupported causal and disclosure claims, tenant fact gaps, adjacent-lane routing, terminology normalization, and cannabis-specific refusal behavior.

notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; jurisdiction and metric-normalization differences are explicitly handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
